name: Superior/IHP BDB 36 Inch Bi-Fold Tempered Glass Fireplace Doors - Black
description: Don't let chips or cracks in your fireplace doors damper your enjoyment of your Superior fireplace. These Bi-Fold Fireplace Doors install quickly into the spot your old, damaged bi-fold doors once occupied and help protect your floors and furniture from escaping sparks and excess heat. The addition of new glass fireplace doors brings a sleek and modern design to your fireplace without expensive remodeling costs, and the black finish accompanies nearly any hearth design or color scheme.

name: Superior/IHP 42 Inch Black Extruded Aluminum Bi-Fold Glass Doors
description: Flying sparks and embers are a danger to your home, but nothing beats an unhindered view of dancing flames in a fireplace. Viewing enjoyment does not have to be lessened by safety, not when you install this beautiful door set on your fireplace. Crafted with extruded aluminum and clear glass, these bi-fold doors open easily to allow easy access for fire maintenance. Available in both 36" and 42" sizes, the doors are designed for use with various Superior/IHP/Vantage Hearth Gas Fireplaces. You know you will get a perfect fit for your fireplace as well as protection for your home all without sacrificing those lovely moments of fire gazing.
